---
## 一：类型：
已知 e、d、c ,求 m
## 二：例一：
```python
from gmpy2 import *
from sympy import iroot,nextprime,isprime
from libnum import *

e = 0x10001
c = 
d = 

for k in range(pow(2,15),pow(2,16)):
    if (e*d-1)%k == 0:
        phi = (e*d-1)//k
        P1 = iroot(phi,2)[0]    #  对(q-1)*(p-1)开平方
        p = nextprime(P1)     # 获取素数P
        q_1 = phi//(p-1)      # 得到(q-1)
        q = q_1+1
        if(isprime(q)):       # 对q进行素性检测
                   break
'''
print(p,q)




'''

n=p*q

m = pow(c,d,n)

print(n2s(m))
```
